name: Nantong Haixing Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Nantong Haixing Electronics Co., Ltd. manufacturers and sells of electrode foils for aluminum electrolytic capacitors in the People's Republic of China. Its products include medium and high voltage etched and formed foils; and low voltage etched and formed foils. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Nantong, the People's Republic of China.
